About Us

Your Potential Life Changing

PITxGROK

This project is initiated by Jackson Dev from Pitbull, who achieved significant price pumps of over 1000X in 2021. Jackson Dev deployed the CA Pitbull and burned the liquidity pool to ensure project stability. Previous projects led by Jackson Dev, such as Safepitbull, experienced price pumps of over 500X, while Pitbull Classic saw increases of over 150X. Join us as we catch the wave of the next big memetoken season. it's not just about minting a token; it's about nurturing a thriving community. Come along on our exhilarating journey as we set our sights on reaching the moon! we're not merely creating a token; we're building community. Join us on our journey to the moon. Let's start the new trend together.
